name: Abyss King
short_description: The abyss In the bottomless dark abyss, Xiao Wei lights up the lights, attracting the attention of the surrounding creatures, and the sound of footsteps approaching quickly to support this luminous object , light the path, and work together to find the way out of the abyss..
detailed_description:
game introduction
If you want to leave the abyss, you must first use the power of available items and creatures in the abyss.

Game Features
Action Design, Melee/Defense, Shooting/Reloading, Item Use, and Capley Collaboration
There are many interactive items in the level, avoid traps, explore and collect survival props
